title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, Phi-3 and other LLMs locally with a single CLI or REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: llama-index-integrations/tools/ollama
summary: LlamaIndex reader & generator nodes powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; no API keys needed, runs entirely local.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting and themes.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Minimal Alpine-based multi-arch Docker image for Ollama (x86 & ARM).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and reactive wrappers.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; same ergonomics as Python/JS clients.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Lightweight React chatbot component that talks to Ollama over REST.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes, brainstorm and Q&A using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: LogSeq plugin that adds /ollama slash commands for inline AI assistance.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot that brings any Ollama model into group chats with per-user quotas.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord.py bot that streams Ollama answers into threads with slash commands.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir OTP client for Ollama with GenServer-backed connection pooling.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package to run or query Ollama models from mobile/desktop apps.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate offering strongly-typed async bindings to Ollama’s REST API.
